mapper.select: SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.POST_ID, TBR.REPLY_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, COUNT(TBRL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBRL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED FROM TBL_REPLY TBR JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBR.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY_LIKE TBRL ON TBR.ID = TBRL.REPLY_ID WHERE TBR.POST_ID = #{postId} GROUP BY TBR.ID, TBR.POST_ID, TBR.REPLY_CONTENT, TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL ORDER BY TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM TBL_REPLY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{id}
